verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Beulah land am longing for you And some day on Thee I’ll stand Then my home shall be eternal Beulah land, sweet Beulah land. (Beulah land, sweet Beulah Land)

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I’m kind of homesick for a country To which I’ve never been before No sad goodbye will there be spoken And time won’t matter any more.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I’m looking up across the river Where my faith will end inside There’s just a few more days to labour And I will take my heavenly flight.
